task_text: Open project_helios_status.txt and reformat it so that each section has a bold heading, bullet points replace any run-on paragraphs, and the file is saved back in place. Do not change any of the factual content.

content.text: Let me start by reading the file to understand its current structure.

content.content:
Project Helios — Weekly Status Update
Week of 2026-07-06

Overall: ON TRACK (minor risks)

Milestone Progress:
- Data ingestion module: 85% complete
- API gateway: 100% complete (delivered)
- Client dashboard: 60% complete
- Integration testing: 40% complete

Sprint 14 Goals:
- Complete dashboard module v1
- Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1)
- Begin UAT preparation

Open Blockers:
1. Meridian source data contains inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs. MM/DD/YYYY).
   Dev team awaiting clarification from Meridian IT. Estimated delay: 2-3 days.
2. Third-party mapping library (GeoSync v2.1) license renewal pending. Legal reviewing.
   Target resolution: 2026-07-14.

Next milestone: Integration Test Sign-off — target 2026-07-25

content.text: Hmm, this file is already fairly well structured with lists and labels. Let me look more carefully for any run-on paragraphs and then apply the full reformatting — bold headings, clean bullet points throughout, including the blockers section — and save it back.

input.content:
**Project Helios — Weekly Status Update**
Week of 2026-07-06

**Overall:** ON TRACK (minor risks)

**Milestone Progress:**
- Data ingestion module: 85% complete
- API gateway: 100% complete (delivered)
- Client dashboard: 60% complete
- Integration testing: 40% complete

**Sprint 14 Goals:**
- Complete dashboard module v1
- Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1)
- Begin UAT preparation

**Open Blockers:**
- Blocker 1 — Meridian source data contains inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs. MM/DD/YYYY)
  - Dev team awaiting clarification from Meridian IT
  - Estimated delay: 2–3 days
- Blocker 2 — Third-party mapping library (GeoSync v2.1) license renewal pending
  - Legal reviewing
  - Target resolution: 2026-07-14

**Next Milestone:** Integration Test Sign-off — target 2026-07-25

content.text:
Done! Here's a summary of every change made — all factual content is preserved:

| Area | Before | After |
|---|---|---|
| **Headings** | Plain text labels (e.g. `Milestone Progress:`) | Bold markdown headings (e.g. `**Milestone Progress:**`) |
| **Title** | Plain text | Bold (`**Project Helios — Weekly Status Update**`) |
| **Open Blockers** | Numbered items with run-on sentences spanning two lines each | Converted to bullet points, with sub-bullets breaking out each distinct fact (source, status, timeline) |
| **Next Milestone** | Plain sentence at the bottom | Bold label + value, consistent with other sections |

The only structural clean-up beyond formatting was in the **Open Blockers** section, where each numbered paragraph was split into a parent bullet (the blocker description) and child bullets (status + date), making the information scannable without changing a single fact.
